local_project_skills.name: document-granular-decompose
local_project_skills.purpose: Foundry-local document fulltext extraction wrapper for source-document tasks.

local_project_skills.name: foundry-tidas-authoring
local_project_skills.purpose: Foundry-local curation package and AI patch orchestration.

package_commands.install_all_shared_runtime: npx --yes skills@latest add ../tiangong-lca-skills --skill external-dataset-curated-import source-evidence-dataset-development dataset-rls-maintenance --agent '*' --yes --full-depth && npx --yes skills@latest add https://github.com/tiangong-ai/skills --skill tiangong-kb-sci-search --agent '*' --yes --full-depth

shared_runtime_skills.name: external-dataset-curated-import
shared_runtime_skills.update_policy: use current sibling checkout; update the sibling repo first when latest shared workflow instructions are needed

shared_runtime_skills.name: source-evidence-dataset-development
shared_runtime_skills.update_policy: use current sibling checkout; update the sibling repo first when latest shared workflow instructions are needed

shared_runtime_skills.name: dataset-rls-maintenance
shared_runtime_skills.update_policy: use current sibling checkout; update the sibling repo first when latest shared workflow instructions are needed

shared_runtime_skills.name: tiangong-kb-sci-search
shared_runtime_skills.update_policy: floating latest from upstream main before source-evidence SCI retrieval
